response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, enterprise frameworks like Spring, or IDE development — key requirements for the role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only brief, unverified Java exposure in past roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE internals expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with complex systems and developer tooling in diverse contexts
concerns: No clear evidence of Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem expertise
Absence of IDE internals, language server, or JVM tooling experience
Primary tech stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) misaligned with JVM-focused role
